Announcing Microsoft Elevate for Changemakers: Build AI skills for impact

Slide %{start} of %{total}. %{slideTitle}

AI for nonprofits

Bring powerful generative AI into your workflow with Microsoft 365 Copilot, your AI assistant for work. Now available at a 15% discount for eligible nonprofits.
Get started

Microsoft 365 grants and discounts

Microsoft 365 can help your nonprofit simplify IT management and reduce costs—while empowering staff and volunteers to collaborate securely from anywhere, on any device.
Get started See plans & pricing

Security Program for Nonprofits

Protect your organization with security offerings that assess risk, provide monitoring and notification, and training.
Learn more Take a free assessment
End of homepage hero carousel: navigate using the slide tabs section

Advance your mission with Microsoft

Microsoft is committed to providing relevant, affordable, and innovative cloud and AI solutions to help nonprofits tackle the world’s biggest challenges. To ensure affordable access to technology, Microsoft provides grants and discounts for Microsoft cloud solutions including Azure, Dynamics 365, and Microsoft 365 to nonprofits around the globe, along with helping nonprofit professionals with digital and AI skills to accelerate mission impact.
Watch video

Technology grants and discounts

Eligible nonprofits get grants and discounts across Microsoft’s cloud solutions including Azure, Dynamics 365, and Microsoft 365.
Learn more Get started

Microsoft Elevate for Changemakers

Become an AI champion for your team through credentials, a global peer community, training and resources to help build capacity for responsible AI adoption and greater impact.
Get started today

Nonprofit events

Discover events tailored for nonprofits and gain expert insights, connect with industry leaders, and explore solutions centered on nonprofit scenarios.
Explore local nonprofit events

Microsoft Nonprofit AI Advisors

Submit an AI-focused volunteer opportunity to Microsoft’s employee giving platform and access skilled professionals ready to make a difference for your nonprofit.
Submit a request

Featured offers

Microsoft 365 Business Premium

Advance your mission with the tools you need to create and connect—now supercharged with AI. Microsoft 365 Business Premium is now available at a 75% discount for eligible nonprofits.
Learn more Get started

Microsoft 365 Copilot

Transform how your nonprofit works with Microsoft 365 Copilot—an AI-powered assistant that helps your team generate content, analyze data, and summarize emails and meetings. Now available at a 15% discount for eligible nonprofits.
Learn more Get started

Azure

Improve efficiency and reduce costs with Azure. With the annual Azure Grant, nonprofits can leverage $2,000 (USD) Azure services credits per year and access the complete portfolio of Azure products and cloud services.
Learn more Get started

Dynamics 365 Business Central

Transform nonprofit operations with Dynamics 365 Business Central, a comprehensive business management solution that connects finance, operations, fundraising, supply chain, and programs— now available at a 60% discount for eligible nonprofits.
Learn more Get started

This interactive map showcases real stories from our customers around the world. Zoom in for a closer look and use the filters to discover stories by region or product.

Connect with a Microsoft nonprofit partner

Our partners make it their mission to accelerate your mission. These select partners are ready to help you accelerate your digital transformation and find the right cloud solutions for your organization.
Find a partner

Get started with nonprofit offers

Power your nonprofit with free technology grants and discounts from Microsoft. Register today and confirm your organization’s eligibility to access Microsoft nonprofit offers.

Questions about nonprofit offers?

Microsoft representatives can help you find the right products for your organization and address inquiries related to eligibility and technical support.
